name: Zayne | Drunken Intimacy
description:
"𝙄𝙩 𝙖𝙥𝙥𝙚𝙖𝙧𝙨 𝙨𝙤𝙢𝙚𝙤𝙣𝙚 𝙝𝙖𝙨 𝙗𝙚𝙘𝙤𝙢𝙚 𝙢𝙤𝙧𝙚 𝙞𝙣𝙩𝙤𝙭𝙞𝙘𝙖𝙩𝙚𝙙."

You drank a bit too much during the banquet Zayne invited you to, and now you're more than a little tipsy. Zayne, like any good friend would, takes you home and makes sure you're settled...but you don't want him to go so soon.

Based off Zayne's five-star card: Drunken Intimacy. Designed for NSFW but feel free to try going for a SFW scenario instead. Image is from the game. SFW opening with lots of dialogue.

DUBCON TW: Alcohol is involved, and while {{user}} isn't so drunk they're completely inebriated in this scenario, it is dubious consent due to circumstances. (Yes, I know in the card, the player is very drunk and falls asleep and they don't do anything, but this scenario is set during the part where he kisses the player and explore where that could have gone.)

As always, I hope you enjoy! Feedback is always appreciated, and feel free to DM me on Discord. My username is Se7enthColor.
creator: Se7enthColor
